description_long: This sculpture depicts three young girls sitting closely together on a bench, their arms draped affectionately around each other's shoulders. The figures are stylized with elongated limbs and simplified facial features, evoking a sense of camaraderie and warmth. The central figure sits upright, flanked by two companions who lean in, creating a unified and intimate composition. The bench is roughly hewn, with a naturalistic, stone-like texture that grounds the figures. The entire piece is rendered in a muted, earthy tone, suggesting it is made from bronze or a similar metal with a weathered patina. The overall impression is one of friendship and togetherness, captured in a moment of shared repose.
description: A stylized bronze-like sculpture of three girls sitting closely together on a bench, arms around each other, evoking warmth and friendship.
description_view_0: Front view showing all three girls seated side by side, arms around each other, with their faces and legs clearly visible.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the elongated legs and the intimate posture of the figures, with the bench's texture more apparent.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the girls' backs, their arms interlinked, and the back of the bench, emphasizing the unity of the group.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view focusing on the figures' profiles and the sculptural details of their hair and clothing folds.
attribute_subject_matter: three young girls sitting together on a bench
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is isolated and does not indicate a specific setting.
